subject: Cloud Computing
title: The Cloud Economy's Future
description: Learn The Cloud Economy's Future in one minute.

hook.text: AI training runs cost millions in cloud compute. The next wave of cloud spending will dwarf everything before it.

buildup.text: AI, IoT, and edge computing are creating new cloud demand. Every connected device and model needs cloud resources.

discovery.text: GPU cloud pricing is exploding. NVIDIA chips are so scarce that cloud providers can't build fast enough.

twist.text: Some predict cloud will become a commodity — cheap and undifferentiated, like electricity. Margins would collapse.

climax.text: The cloud economy is still young. How pricing, competition, and regulation evolve will shape all of tech.

punchline.text: Cloud economics shaped tech's past. It will define its future.

quiz.question: What is driving the next wave of cloud spending growth?
options: AI training, IoT devices, and edge computing creating massive new demand
Cloud providers raising prices due to lack of competition
Government mandates requiring all companies to use cloud services
